name: Apache Kafka 中间件基线 (CIS + 等保 2.0)
description: Kafka 3.x 安全基线 (KRaft / ZK 通用)

rules.title: SASL 启用 (PLAINTEXT 不可用)
rules.description: broker 必须启 SASL_PLAINTEXT/SASL_SSL 认证

fix.suggestion: listeners=SASL_SSL://0.0.0.0:9093 + security.inter.broker.protocol=SASL_SSL；需配套 JAAS/keystore，不可自动改 listeners (会断broker)，人工处理

rules.title: PLAINTEXT listener 不暴公网
rules.description: 如果保留 PLAINTEXT 必须 bind 内网

fix.suggestion: ZK 模式 authorizer.class.name=kafka.security.authorizer.AclAuthorizer；KRaft 模式用 org.apache.kafka.metadata.authorizer.StandardAuthorizer。模式判断错会断 broker，人工处理

rules.title: 禁用 allow.everyone.if.no.acl.found
rules.description: 默认 deny 是 SOC 标准

fix.command: F=/opt/kafka/config/server.properties; [ -f "$F" ] || exit 1; [ -f "$F.mxbak" ] || cp "$F" "$F.mxbak"; if grep -Eq '^[[:space:]]*allow\.everyone\.if\.no\.acl\.found=' "$F"; then sed -i 's|^[[:space:]]*allow\.everyone\.if\.no\.acl\.found=.*|allow.everyone.if.no.acl.found=false|' "$F"; else printf '\nallow.everyone.if.no.acl.found=false\n' >> "$F"; fi

fix.suggestion: security.inter.broker.protocol=SASL_SSL；需配套 keystore/truststore，无证书直接改会断 broker，人工处理
ssl.client.auth=required；需先部署 keystore/truststore 及客户端证书，否则所有连接被拒，人工处理

rules.title: 非 root 启动 (kafka 用户)

fix.suggestion: 以 kafka 用户启动 (启动脚本/systemd User=kafka)；运行身份非配置项，需人工调整部署方式

fix.command: F=/opt/kafka/config/server.properties; [ -f "$F" ] || exit 1; chmod 640 "$F"; getent passwd kafka >/dev/null 2>&1 && chown kafka:kafka "$F"; true

rules.title: JMX 端口认证
rules.description: JMX 默认无认证, 是 RCE 入口

param: P=$(ps -ef | grep 'kafka.Kafka' | grep -v grep); if echo "$P" | grep -q 'jmxremote'; then echo "$P" | grep -q 'jmxremote.authenticate=true' && echo MX_JMX_OK || echo MX_JMX_BAD; else echo MX_JMX_OK; fi

fix.suggestion: JMX_PORT 必须配 com.sun.management.jmxremote.authenticate=true + ssl=true；JMX 参数在启动环境变量 (KAFKA_JMX_OPTS) 非 server.properties，需人工修改启动脚本并重启

fix.command: F=/opt/kafka/config/log4j.properties; [ -f "$F" ] || exit 1; [ -f "$F.mxbak" ] || cp "$F" "$F.mxbak"; if grep -Eq '^[[:space:]]*log4j\.logger\.kafka\.authorizer\.logger=' "$F"; then sed -i 's|^[[:space:]]*log4j\.logger\.kafka\.authorizer\.logger=.*|log4j.logger.kafka.authorizer.logger=INFO|' "$F"; else printf '\nlog4j.logger.kafka.authorizer.logger=INFO\n' >> "$F"; fi
